overview.description: The TrueShares ConVex Protect ETF (PVEX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in income-producing securities and utilizes put and call options designed to provide partial upside participation in the US large-cap equity market while aiming to limit loss. It seeks capital appreciation with the potential for lower volatility relative to the broader US large-cap equity market PVEX was launched on Jun 27, 2025 and is issued by Truemark Group.
